title: puccinellia stricta var. suborbicularis
intro: Puccinellia stricta var. suborbicularis, also known as the blue wheat grass or alkali blue grass, is a type of plant that belongs to the grass family Poaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory health. The health benefits of Puccinellia stricta var. suborbicularis include its potential to alleviate symptoms of bronchitis, asthma, and other respiratory issues, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
